summary: Full E2E frontend testing of Smart Lost & Found Ecosystem. Verified all public pages (Home, Browse, Centres, Leaderboard, Item Detail with QR modal), admin login + full admin flows (dashboard with 6 stat cards + 2 charts + shortcuts, Found Items list of 10 rows + search + create new item which appeared in DB as item 11, edit form prefilled and saved, Lost Reports list of 3, Claims page with pending tab, Centres CRUD - successfully created TEST_Centre A), student flows with mongosh-injected session cookie for Alice (dashboard with 170 pts and badges, lost-report submission with real GPT-4o-mini AI matches showing 60%/45%/30% similarity badges, My Claims, Notifications with mark-all-read), and RBAC redirects in both directions (student->/admin -> '/', admin->/student -> '/'). All test data cleaned up.

issues: Edit/Delete icon buttons on each centre card have no data-testid (only icon SVGs). Recommend adding data-testid='centre-edit-btn' / 'centre-delete-btn' (and per-id variants) so deletion and edit flows are automatable. Currently testable only via positional selectors.

No data-testid on per-row Approve / Reject / Request Proof buttons. Cannot deterministically open the decision-modal in tests. Add data-testid='claim-approve-btn', 'claim-reject-btn', 'claim-request-proof-btn'.
Per-row QR / Edit / Delete buttons rendered without data-testid. Already have admin-qr-modal & admin-qr-img once open, but the row-level trigger lacks an id.

Found-item cards under the homepage 'Found items showcase' grid do not seem to live under [data-testid='browse-grid'] (that selector is for /browse). On home the showcase grid has no testid - 8 items render correctly but selector is brittle.

action_items: Add data-testid attributes to admin-claims row-action buttons (approve / reject / request-proof) so decision-modal flow can be E2E tested.
Add data-testid to centre edit / delete icon buttons on /admin/centres (and similarly on /admin/found row actions).
Optionally add data-testid='home-found-grid' to the homepage 'Found items showcase' grid (separate from /browse's browse-grid) for stable home-page assertions.
Console: silence React Router v7 future-flag warnings by opting into {v7_startTransition:true, v7_relativeSplatPath:true} when constructing the Router (cosmetic, no functional impact).
critical_code_review_comments: Public unauth GETs (/api/auth/me) return 401 which is surfaced as red console errors on every public page load. Consider treating a missing session as 200 with {user:null} OR swallow the 401 in the axios interceptor so logged-out homepage isn't noisy.

Lost-report submission triggers a real GPT-4o-mini call synchronously on background-task; the UI redirected and matches were visible within ~2s which is good. If the LLM ever slows, consider a skeleton/loading state in the AI Matches section.
Some admin row actions are icon-only without aria-label or testid -- accessibility + testability concern.

success_rate.frontend: ~96% (24/25 verified flows passed; 1 flow - admin claims decision modal - could not be tested because there were no pending claims with action buttons rendered, and the action buttons themselves lack data-testid)

test_credentials: Admin admin@campus.edu / Admin@123 (confirmed prefilled & working). Student session injected via mongosh into user_sessions for alice.student@campus.edu and used as cookie session_token; worked end-to-end.
seed_data_creation: Created during run and CLEANED UP at end: 1 TEST_ found item, 1 TEST_ lost report, 1 TEST_Centre A centre, 1 test_session_* user_session. Verified via mongosh deleteMany counts.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend E2E green. AI matcher (GPT-4o-mini via Emergent LLM key) confirmed live -- new lost report immediately produced 3 similarity-scored matches. Student auth pattern: insert user_sessions row via mongosh + set cookie session_token=<token> on domain campus-recovery-14.preview.emergentagent.com with secure=True sameSite=None. Admin auth: POST /api/auth/admin/login returns access_token, stored as localStorage.admin_token and sent as Authorization: Bearer header by axios. Outstanding minor testability gaps listed in design_issues; not blocking.
rca of the issue: No functional issues found. Decision-modal flow for admin claims could not be exercised because (a) no pending claims with row action buttons rendered in the current seed state, and (b) those action buttons lack data-testid. Recommend main agent add the testids; flow itself appears wired correctly (decision-modal, decision-notes, decision-confirm testids exist in JSX).
